atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports annual exam and discussion of current health status.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports traveling recently, particularly hiking, including a trip to the Northern Cascades last weekend.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports doing well with her diet, resisting tater tots and salty foods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports consistently taking her blood pressure medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports therapy has been helpful over the past year.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally forgetting to take her blood pressure medications, particularly when work is stressful.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any current feelings of self-harm or harming others.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports nasal congestion from fall pollen allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a systolic ejection murmur of three out of six.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals one plus pitting edema in the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The echocardiogram from last year showed a low-ish pumping function of the heart at 45%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The echocardiogram from last year showed mitral regurgitation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The lipid panel from last year showed a slightly elevated cholesterol level.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure readings today are elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with hypertension

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with depression

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is prescribed lisinopril

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is prescribed lisinopril at 40 milligrams daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is prescribed lasix

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is prescribed lasix at 20 milligrams daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An echocardiogram is ordered for repeat evaluation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is instructed to monitor and record her blood pressures daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is instructed to report her blood pressures to the provider

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow-up is scheduled in four weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.
